member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceParameter
member.summary: Handle the pre-instance event common parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceParameter.PostExecute(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute the PostInstance callback from the common parameter.
member.param: Th event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceParameter.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute the dispose function.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FivrConditionCommonParam
member.summary: This class defines the FivrCondition common parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FivrConditionCommonParam.GetPlistName(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the Plist Name for current instance Patlist param.
member.param: the plist param name from current instance to get plist name from.
member.returns: The plist name from the current instance param.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FivrConditionCommonParam.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: A closing function for dispose function.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FivrConditionCommonParam.Reset(Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble)
member.summary: Remove verify and preExecute so that an instance verified multiple times does not accumulate multiple verifications and executions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FivrConditionCommonParam.PreExecute(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute the PreExecute callback from the common parameter.
member.param: The event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FlowIndexCommonParam
member.summary: Handle the pre-instance event common parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FlowIndexCommonParam.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: A closing function for dispose function.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.FlowIndexCommonParam.FlowIndexFunction(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute the PreInstane callback from the common parameter.
member.param: Th event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam
member.summary: Handle the pat config set point.
Get handle for current Module and group and add it to container with requested set point value.
member.param: the set point value if exist.
current handles that are currently in use.
Container to add the handle to.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.GetHandleParams(System.String,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: check that the token is valid and extract module name, group name and value .
member.param: token in format module:group:value or module:group.
the set point value if exist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: To dispose the data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.Reset(Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble)
member.summary: Reset all members and remove from instance pre and post.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.GetPlistName(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get Plist Name for current instance .
member.returns: plist name from current instance param.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.PreExecute(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute the PreInstance callback from the common parameter.
member.param: Th event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.PostExecute(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute the PostInstance callback from the common parameter.
member.param: Th event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointHandle
member.summary: Container for handle and value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointHandle.#ctor(Prime.PatConfigService.IPatConfigSetPointHandle,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: current handle of setPoint to apply data.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointHandle.Apply
member.summary: Apply set point value to handler.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointHandle.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute the dispose function.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PostInstanceCommonParam
member.summary: Handle the post-instance event common parameter.

member.summary: Execute the PostInstance callback from the common parameter.
member.param: Th event args. Will be EventsArgs.Empty in this case.

member.summary: Empty dispose method.

member.summary: This class defines the PostPlist common parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SetPointHandleParams
member.summary: Contains SetPoint parameters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SetPointHandleParams.Module
member.summary: Gets or sets Module.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SetPointHandleParams.Group
member.summary: Gets or sets Group.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SetPointHandleParams.Plist
member.summary: Gets or sets Plist.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SetPointHandleParams.RegEx
member.summary: Gets or sets RegEx.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SoftwareTriggerCallbackCommonParam
member.summary: This class defines the SoftwareTrigger common parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SoftwareTriggerCallbackCommonParam.SoftwareTriggerCallBack
member.summary: Gets or sets callback name without argument, argument is the payload of TOSTrigger instruction in pattern.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.SoftwareTriggerCallbackCommonParam.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: To dispose the data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceModes
member.summary: Defines the different modes for the ApplyEndSequence functionality at the end of test.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceModes.DISABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is disabled, the port on an alarm event will be the default=[-2].

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ApplyEndSequenceModes.ENABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is enabled, the port on an alarm event will be a positive value.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IApplyEndSequenceParameter
member.summary: The ApplyEndSequenceParameter common parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IApplyEndSequenceParameter.ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets if has to apply the EndSequence at the end of the current instance or not.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParameters
member.summary: The base interface for all the common parameters objects.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParameters.Verify(Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The Verify function for the common parameter.
member.param: the instance this Verify was executed from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble
member.summary: The interface that allow a test method to accept common parameters.

member.name: E:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble.OnPreExecute
member.summary: This event is being raised at pre-execute

member.name: E:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ICommonParamsAble.OnPostExecute
member.summary: This event is being raised at post-execute

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFivrConditionCommonParam
member.summary: The interface class for FivrConditionCommonParam.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFivrConditionCommonParam.FivrConditionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Fivr Condition to apply.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFivrConditionCommonParam.FivrConditionPlistParamName
member.summary: Gets or sets The name of the parameter in the current instance that holds the plist name. If a FivrCondition is specified, this field must not be empty.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFlowIndexCommonParam
member.summary: The PreInstance common parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFlowIndexCommonParam.FlowIndexCallbackName
member.summary: Gets or sets Flow Index callback function name. in the format of CALLBACKNAME(ARGS).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IFlowIndexCommonParam.FlowIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets parameter to specify the instance flow index on Dynamic Flows.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PlistMode
member.summary: Plist Mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PlistMode.Local
member.summary: Local

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.PlistMode.Global
member.summary: Global.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam
member.summary: The PatConfigSetPointsCommonParam common parameter interface.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointsPlistParamName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of a param at current instance that hold plist name.If empty setpoints will be applied on all patterns defined in configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointsRegEx
member.summary: Gets or sets the Regular Expression to minimize the patterns in the configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointsPreInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the A list of Group names and Set point value to apply before test execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointsPostInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the A list of Group names and Set point value to apply after test execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPatConfigSetPointsCommonParam.SetPointsPlistMode
member.summary: Gets or sets Plist Mode to Local or Global.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPostInstanceCommonParam
member.summary: The PreInstance common parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPostInstanceCommonParam.PostInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the post-instance callback in the format of CALLBACKNAME(ARGS).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPostPlistCommonParam
member.summary: The PostPlist common parameter interface.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPostPlistCommonParam.PostPlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the post-plist callback in the format of CALLBACKNAME(ARGS).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPreInstanceCommonParam
member.summary: The PreInstance common parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPreInstanceCommonParam.PreInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the pre-instance callback in the format of CALLBACKNAME(ARGS).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPrePlistCommonParam
member.summary: The PrePlist common parameter interface.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IPrePlistCommonParam.PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the pre-plist callback in the format of CALLBACKNAME(ARGS).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IRelayTestConditionCommonParam
member.summary: The interface class for RelayTestConditionCommonParam.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.IRelayTestConditionCommonParam.RelayTestConditionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the RelayTestCondition to apply.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ISoftwareTriggerCallbackCommonParam
member.summary: The interface class for SoftwareTriggerCommonParam.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CommonParams.ISoftwareTriggerCallbackCommonParam.SoftwareTriggerCallBack
member.summary: Gets or sets callback name to use in softwareTrigger. Note: Only is enabled callback name, the argument is payload of TOSTrigger instruction in pattern.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel
member.summary: The datalog level for Ituff printout(ALL, FAIL_ONLY, COMPRESS, PINMAP_COMPRESS).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.ALL
member.summary: Print fail and pass results.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.FAIL_ONLY
member.summary: Print fail results only.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.PIN_DETAIL
member.summary:
Print DPS pin name and SuperPinGroup (if used), Pin Channel is printed as a comnt if pin failed. ###########################################################################################################################################
2_tname_"MyTestInstanceName"_"MySuperPinGroupName"_"MyPinName"_"MyCustomPosFixText" 2_mrslt_"MyPinResult" 2_msunit_MyValueUnit 2_comnt_FailData_"MyChannelNumber"
Note: - TIN = Test Instance Name - SPG = Super Pin Group name (if used) - PN = Pin Name - PF = Post fix text (if used) - DR = Double Result - U = Unit - CN = Channel Number (if pin failed comnt line is printed)
Example: 2_tname_MyTestInstanceName_MySuperPinGroup1_MyPinName1_MyCustomPostFix 2_mrslt_0.3450 2_msunit_V 2_tname_MyTestInstanceName_MyPinName2_MyCustomPostFix 2_mrslt_-0.0230 2_msunit_V 2_comnt_FailData_2
Example note: - First ituff has myPinName1 defined in MySuperPinGroup, Result is pass. - Second ituff has myPinName2 no defined in any super pin group but has result failed and printed the channel in last line.
###########################################################################################################################################

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.METADATA
member.summary: ituff compress mode using metatag (StringParsedMetadataHelper)

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.METADATA_AVERAGE
member.summary: ituff compress mode using metatag with average value(StringParsedMetadataHelper)

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel.NONE
member.summary: No printing.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod
member.summary: This interface declares the common parameters that every dc test method should follow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod.DatalogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets datalog level(ALL, FAIL_ONLY, COMPRESS, PINMAP_COMPRESS").

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated Pins to get DC results for.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod.MeasurementTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated measurement type(Current, Voltage").

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod.LowLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated low limits for the measure Pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IDcTestMethod.HighLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated high limits for the measure Pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.IFunctionalTestMethod
member.summary: This interface declares the common parameters that every functional test method (running a plist) should follow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IFunctionalTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IFunctionalTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IFunctionalTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.ILevelTcTestMethod
member.summary: This interface declares the common parameters for a test method with Level setup test condition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.ILevelTcTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.IPatternScoreboardTestMethod
member.summary: This interface declares the common parameters that every functional test method (running a plist) should follow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IPatternScoreboardTestMethod.BaseNumbers
member.summary: Gets or sets an integer number value to prefix the generated scoreboard fail counters This parameter supports multiple base numbers.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IPatternScoreboardTestMethod.PatternNameCounterIndexes
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Positive indexes, starting at 0, map characters at the start of the pattern name. Negative indexes, starting at -1, map characters at the end of the pattern name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.IPatternScoreboardTestMethod.MaxFailsNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of fails that can be processed for scoreboard counters. This parameter is zero by default. If no other positive value is passed, then the maximum possible integer value will be used.
